market_context: US equity markets are CLOSED today (Independence Day observed; July 4 falls on Saturday) - all snapshot bars end 07-02, so nothing proposed today could fill today. Tape into the holiday: Dow at record highs as money rotates out of AI chips into blue chips ('Dow Hits Records as Money Rotates Out of AI Chips Into Blue Chips', Benzinga week wrap 07-02) and 'Dow Jones Hits Record High as Chip Bloodbath Sinks Nasdaq 100' (07-02); SOXX just had its worst 2-day drop in over a year (07-02). Data pull is again PARTIAL: fundamentals failed for all 7 tickers (proxy 403), prices+news intact - so the sector cap cannot be enforced on any buy, same failure as 07-02. Portfolio is 100% cash, so the holdings-only breaking-news web sweep was not applicable. Closed market + degraded data + no fresh thesis-grade catalysts = all holds; the live JNJ buy thesis stays parked until a clean-data trading day. VOO 684.68, +0.5% over 30d.

signals.thesis: June buy thesis intact (IMAAVY data in 12 abstracts at EAN 2026 and TECVAYLI CHMP positive recommendation, both 06-26; CDC Level 1 Ebola activation 06-26 and 'White House Adds Pandemic Response Staff as Ebola Cases Rise' 07-01 add vaccine optionality), but entry has degraded: 263.04 is the exact 30d high, +14.7% over 30d vs 254 yesterday. Market closed today and fundamentals/sector data unavailable. Hold; re-propose buy on a clean-data trading day if close holds above 240.

signals.thesis: Memory-cost story evolving from headwind to pass-through: 'What's Behind Apple's Hardware Price Hikes as Memory Supplies Tighten?' (07-02) and 'Apple's Aggressive Price Hikes Raise Eyebrows As Wall Street Links AI Chip Shortages To Inflation' (07-02). Price hikes defend margin but test demand into the iPhone cycle; price 308.43, +2.1% over 30d, upper-mid range. No measurable edge yet. Falsified toward sell if hikes visibly dent unit demand; toward buy if margins hold at launch.
